cot_prefix: Okay, let's look at the question and the passage. The question is asking what the dance project aims to do. The options are A through D. First, I'll read through the passage again to make sure I understand the main points. The project is run by the Rebecca Davis Dance Company. They teach dance to street children in Rwanda. The children have lost their families, some have been in prison, others have sold their bodies. The dance classes provide structured learning and self-expression they haven't had before.
